title: Guns Without Roses Additions
description: Compatibility between Guns Without Roses and a bunch of random mods. (still no roses)
body:
This adds compatibility between [Guns Without Roses](https://modrinth.com/mod/guns-without-roses) and an assortment of random mods. There are still no roses however.

Content is only loaded if the corresponding mod is present.

**[Windswept](https://modrinth.com/mod/windswept): 1 bullet**

* Frost Bullet: inflict a stacking freezing, like Powder Snow or Frost Arrows.

**[The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest) or [Tinkers Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct): 1 gun 1 bullet**

* Knightmetal Blaster: shotgun that fires more projectiles if you have more Armor Points.
* Knightmetal Bullet: bonus damage against target with Armor Points.
* _Full support for Tinkers currently not planned on this mod, but it has Knightmetal._

**[The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether): 2 guns 1 bullet**

* Zanite Gun: like the Zanite Sword, gains damage as its durability lowers.
* Gravitite Shotgun: slower but each shot also knocks back nearby enemies.
* Zanite Bullet: retains its damage against Aether mobs. _(note: Gunpowder can't be natively found in the Aether and I did not find a proper substitute, so guns aren't useable on an Aether start)_

**[Deep Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/deep-aether): 1 gun**

* Skyjade Gun: like the Skyjade Sword, has a high damage bonus that fades away as its durability lowers.

**[The Aether: Redux](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aether-redux): 1 gun**

* Veridium Revolver: a weak pistol, but like the Veridium Sword can be infused with Ambrosium Shards to make it much stronger.

**[Aether's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-aethers-delight): 1 gun 1 bullet**

* Arkenium Gun: just like Arkenium subsitute Iron in several recipes, this acts exactly like an Iron Gun.
* Arkenium Bullet: identical to a Zanite Bullet except that it can also count as an Iron Bullet (for crafting or the Blaze Gun).

**[The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden): 2 bullets**

* Utherium Bullet: extra damage to Rotspawn, just like Utherium equipment.
* Froststeel Bullet: slows on hit, just like Froststeel equipment.

**[The Bumblezone](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-bumblezone): 1 bullet**

* Honey Crystal Bullet: inflicts Wrath of the Hive that angers nearby Bees at the target.

**[Botania](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania): 3 guns 2 bullets**

* Manasteel Gun: to the Iron Gun what the Manasteel tools are to Iron tools.
* Elementium Gun: a high chance to not consume ammo.
* Terra Blaster: high damage shotgun that also fires a mana burst for extra damage.
* Manasteel Bullet: a bit more damage than an Iron Bullet.
* Elementium Bullet: benefits from equipment that buffs pixies *(Elementium Sword and a full Elementium Armor)*.

**[Cloud Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-cloud-storage): 1 bullet**

* Balloon Bullet: ties a balloon on hit, just like a Balloon Arrow.

Also I'm not taking suggestions.
